metadata.description: Simulator-mindset skill: don't ask the AI "what do you think" — ask "what group of people would best explore this, and what would they say?" Traditional Chinese (Taiwan).

plugins.name: best-minds
plugins.description: 「模擬器思維」方法論 skill：不問「你怎麼看」，改問「世界上哪群人最適合探討這個？他們會怎麼說？」。基於 Andrej Karpathy 的 simulator 觀點（2025），含反諂媚護欄、引言查證、平行 subagent 面板流程。
